Hey there, I just want to make a quick point here. Since we've run the program a few times now, one of the edits we made that it was sold out. So, SCARES is incredibly important for a variety of things. One, for the edification or positioning of the body transformation specialist that you're going to be setting up with this sale system, which we'll get to later. Two, it shows the validity and the value of the program because if it's sold out then a lot of people wanted to do it. Three, it also has social proof because so many people wanted to do it. And so all of these things are all tied into a single concept of being sold out. Okay, so we made that edit and it's really helped everyone. But it especially helps to set our position, the closer and the program because it's like, hey, this thing's already sold out and since we only have two spots left, the person can't delay what time they're going to come in. They're going to come in in the next 48 hours otherwise you're going to have to get the spot up to someone else. And so most of them understand that. And so that kind of sets the stage for everything else. Now obviously this offer was really high converting and worked really well using all the sale systems that we had outlined already. But adding the sold out piece just makes it even more awesome. So be sure to utilize it to the highest degree and profit from it and help people change their lives.
